cohesion_coherence.notes: Use of cohesive devices (conjunctions, reference words, ellipsis, lexical cohesion) to create logical progression and unity of text

criteria.C2: Uses a wide range of cohesive devices with full naturalness and effectiveness; text is cohesive throughout
criteria.C1: Uses cohesive devices effectively; appropriate paragraphing; text is cohesive and coherent throughout
criteria.B2: Uses a range of cohesive devices; generally well-organized; may have some lapses
criteria.B1: Uses some basic cohesive devices; generally organized but may lack overall progression
criteria.A2: Uses limited cohesive devices; may be repetitive; organization may not be clear
criteria.A1: Uses little or no cohesive devices; text may be difficult to follow

criteria.C2: Wide range of vocabulary used precisely; no errors
criteria.C1: Wide range of vocabulary for most topics; occasional inaccuracies
criteria.B2: Sufficient range for clear communication; some word choice errors
criteria.B1: Limited range but can convey meaning; frequent errors
criteria.A2: Basic vocabulary; frequent errors cause misunderstanding
criteria.A1: Very limited vocabulary; communication barely possible

criteria.C2: Consistent control of complex structures; no errors
criteria.C1: Good control of complex structures; occasional errors
criteria.B2: Good control of simple structures; some complex attempts; few errors
criteria.B1: Uses simple structures appropriately; some errors but communication clear
criteria.A2: Uses some simple structures correctly; frequent errors
criteria.A1: Very limited control of structures; constant errors
